projects.title: DE-Studio Agency
projects.description: A modern, fully responsive agency website showcasing brand identity, web design, and development services. All dynamic content managed through JSON data structures for easy maintenance.

projects.title: Heirloom App
projects.description: An AI-powered mobile app that creates a personalized digital legacy. Connects users with loved ones through continued conversations based on interaction data.

projects.title: Chatcrypt
projects.description: A secure, anonymous chat application with ephemeral messages that auto-delete daily. Features real-time messaging, media sharing, and server status monitoring.

projects.title: Word Bound
projects.description: A real-time multiplayer word game where players form words starting with the last letter of the previous word. Features live typing preview for enhanced interaction.
